posts.author: maximus_dinosaurus
posts.title: A few words from Patrick Henry...

posts.raw_content:
We need STRONG JEFFERSON level MADISON level COKE level American litigators to get to work invoking the Laws of Coke, and Madison, and Jefferson on behalf of the American. 


I've studied history. I have binoculars. I can see across the Pacific, I can see across the atlantic, I can see South America. 

They're a troop of liars and thieves that trick well meaning people with sophistry. Not even good sophistry... 


Like 2000 words of fake analysis ending with the gay non-sequitur..."and therefor freedom of the will is itself governed by historical development." 


Like 3000 words gay analysis ending with the fake non-sequitur..."and therefor gender is an assignment, and family is a social construct allowed by the collective." 


Then assembling them together into 10000 words of gay and fake analysis ending with the fake and gay 'Scientific' Socialism's..."and therefore private property is a theft from the collective."


This is all 1880s goofy weird cocaine brain Engels using his teacher's dialect on everything that gets in the way of his jurisdiction liquidation machine...


We must be able to speak the law to each other so simply, so plainly to one another that no sophisticated sounding, funny hat wearing, self-referential diploma waiving predator can ever eat one of us again. 


---

Every single American is born with private exclusive private property, and coequal public property Ordinary rights: 

It looks like this when drawn:

[your private property] [coequal public property] [my private property]

Direct taxes shared equally. 

Extraordinary Use taxes fixed at the same rate. [art1 sec 3,8,9]


Secured by mutual compact: 

I won't breach you and yours, and I will help secure you and yours from breach

-regardless of the color of your skin, the god you worship, or any other personal attribute you have. 


American Pump Victory Tour: 
⚖️Ruinous Socialist Confiscation v. Productive American Taxation
🎧Socialism's gay [extended edition with extra gay] 
No Sponsors Foreign or Domestic | Produced as a matter of civic duty to secure the property of every single American.

https://chavezatomics.substack.com/p/american-pump-victory-tour-socialism
